description: Arena multi-agent orchestration — run 10 specialized agents in parallel

ceo-review.description: CEO product review — challenge premises, scope decision

eng-review.description: Engineering manager review — architecture, tests, performance

qa-report.description: QA report — systematic testing without code changes

security-review.description: Security audit — auth, payment, API, RLS

qa-fix.description: QA with auto-fix — test, find bugs, fix, commit

qa-design.description: Design QA with auto-fix — spacing, typography, AI slop

ship.description: Release — merge, test, version bump, CHANGELOG, PR

usage.full_review: Run all review_phase sessions in parallel, then fix_phase, then ship_phase, then post_ship
usage.quick_ship: Run eng-review → qa-fix → ship → doc-release sequentially
usage.audit_only: Run review_phase in parallel, produce reports only
